rationale: The proposed change concerns a property tax homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). The rule text governs teacher probationary-to-continuing contract conversion under Educ. Code §21.153. The two provisions are unrelated and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 21.153. CONVERSION OF PROBATIONARY CONTRACT TO CONTINUING CONTRACT.
_note: No relationship between the proposed tax exemption change and this education employment provision.
